feature.name: ORM query builder and SQL AST
feature.description: Extract VibeShop's mini Query-to-SQL AST compiler as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: build SELECT queries with columns, FROM table, WHERE predicates, and INNER joins
materialize immutable SQL AST nodes from Query.build_ast
compile AST nodes and Query objects to parameterized SQL strings
track compiled query AST payloads in GLOBAL_STATE
support eq/neq/gt/gte/lt/lte comparison operators in WHERE clauses
excluded_behaviors: YAML bootstrap, pricing, CSV, and session modules
database drivers and runtime query execution
original project tests and CLI entrypoints

entanglement.description: Query compilation is split across builder, AST, and compiler modules with duplicate utils shortcuts and GLOBAL_STATE query bookkeeping.
signals: two similarly named query helpers with incorrect semantics
build_ast appends compiled AST dicts to GLOBAL_STATE
